failures.description: The agent deviated from the required tool-call plan despite having the correct arguments available, preparing an invalid and incomplete ProductCatalogSearch call.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to retrieve the price of item 2177997696. The required tool-call information was already available in the Coordinator output: ProductCatalogSearch with item_id "2177997696" and product_id "1968349452". At index 2, the Researcher instead prepared ProductCatalogSearch with {"product_id": 0}, omitting item_id and changing product_id to an unsupported numeric value. This was not resolved later; the tool rejected the malformed call at index 3 and the agent ended with an incomplete answer.
